docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY BILL HALL BAIL BONDS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY BILL HALL BAIL BONDS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.00
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
CASH SUBSTITUTION OF SURETY BOND/COURT COST DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
